other_observers: Cody Wild, lots of other people there also but I don't remember everyone there; It was staked out for a long time and anyone that wanted to see a Snowy Owl probably went and saw it.
specific_location: On Scott Road very close to Highway 24.
description: A very large and round bird sitting on the ground with a very round head and a fairly short tail. It was mostly all white. It had quite a few small brown barring on the back and even a little on the back. It had feathers going all the way down the legs onto the feet. It had a small black bill and yellow eyes. In flight it had very rounded wings.Behaviors: It was sitting on the ground for a while, it then flew about 200 yards and then landed on the ground again. It then flew again and landed again on the ground.Call: Never heard itPlumage: Adult
